product_results.title: Nike Men's Air Max Torch 4 Anthracite/Metallic/Silverq Running Shoe 10.5 Men US

summary.text: These shoes receive positive feedback for their appearance, with customers describing them as very nice and good. The comfort level is well-regarded, with users finding them very comfortable. The foot support is appreciated, as customers note they provide good support for feet. However, customers have mixed opinions regarding the fit and size of the shoes.

authors_reviews.title: Best
authors_reviews.text: Very happy with this product — it works exactly as described and feels well-made for the price. Easy to use and performs reliably; I would definitely recommend it.
authors_reviews.author: Md Harun Roshid

authors_reviews.title: Hyper confo
authors_reviews.text: Très légère ideal pour la course
authors_reviews.author: Client d'Amazon

authors_reviews.title: They hot shoes
authors_reviews.text: I got 10.5 but had to reorder size 11 so get a size a bit bigger than normal
authors_reviews.author: peter bogdala
